description.value:
While casting the spell, you place a vial of quicksilver in the chest of a life-sized human doll stuffed with ash or dust. You stitch up the doll and drip your blood on it. At the end of the casting, tap the doll with a crystal rod — it transforms into a magen clothed in whatever the doll was wearing. You choose the type of magen during casting (see Appendix C for statistics).

When the magen appears, your hit point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the magen's challenge rating (minimum 1). Only a wish spell can undo this reduction. Any magen you create obeys your commands without question.

components.materials: a vial of quicksilver worth 500 gp and a life-sized human doll (both consumed), plus an intricate crystal rod worth at least 1,500 gp (not consumed)

system.source: Rime of the Frostmaiden, Appendix D
